entry.title: New: CR 25-85 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 169, CD1 (2025), to preserve attainable housing by: 1) allowing the Director of Finance to consider shared-equity deed restrictions when assessing real property; and 2) setting clear standards to ensure similar properties receive fair treatment.

Special Committee on Real Property Tax Reform

View on the council site
